name: Apple 67W USB-C Power Adapter
description: Official Apple fast charger designed for MacBook Air and MacBook Pro. Delivers efficient and safe charging with USB-C Power Delivery support.
warning: Ensure your device supports USB-C Power Delivery before use.

name: Dell 65W USB-C Laptop Charger
description: Reliable Dell USB-C charger compatible with most modern Dell laptops. Provides stable power delivery and efficient charging.
warning: Check your laptop supports USB-C charging before purchase.

name: HP 90W Smart Laptop Charger
description: High-performance HP charger with smart pin technology for stable and efficient power delivery across multiple HP laptops.
warning: Ensure the connector pin matches your HP laptop model.

name: Lenovo 65W USB-C Charger
description: Compact and efficient Lenovo USB-C charger designed for ThinkPad and IdeaPad series. Ideal for travel and everyday use.
warning: Confirm your device supports USB-C charging.

name: ASUS 120W Gaming Laptop Charger
description: High-wattage charger built for ASUS gaming laptops. Ensures stable power delivery during heavy gaming and performance tasks.
warning: Use only with compatible ASUS models to avoid damage.

name: Universal Laptop Charger 90W (Multi-tip)
description: Versatile universal charger with multiple connector tips, compatible with a wide range of laptop brands. Ideal backup solution.
warning: Ensure correct voltage and connector tip before use to avoid damaging your device.

name: Acer 65W Slim Laptop Charger
description: Slim and portable Acer charger designed for everyday use. Provides efficient charging with minimal heat output.
warning: Confirm compatibility with your Acer model before purchase.

name: Anker 100W USB-C GaN Charger
description: Premium GaN fast charger capable of powering laptops, tablets, and phones. Compact yet powerful with multiple ports.
warning: Ensure your device supports USB-C PD charging and required wattage.
